phrases.text_local: Est-ce que la cathédrale est ouverte au public ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kuh lah kah-tay-DRAHL eh oo-VEHRT oh poo-BLEEK
phrases.cultural_note: Notre-Dame reopened in December 2024 after the devastating 2019 fire. The restored interior features a stunning new look. Entry is free but timed tickets may be required.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the history of the cathedral
phrases.text_local: Quand est-ce que la cathédrale a été construite ?
phrases.pronunciation: kahn ess kuh lah kah-tay-DRAHL ah ay-TAY kohn-STRWEET
phrases.cultural_note: Construction began in 1163 and took nearly 200 years to complete. It's a masterpiece of French Gothic architecture located on the Île de la Cité.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if you can visit the towers
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut monter dans les tours ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kohn puh mohn-TAY dahn lay TOOR
phrases.cultural_note: The tower climb offers close-up views of the gargoyles and a panorama of Paris. Check current availability as access may be limited during ongoing restoration work.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what was damaged in the fire
phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce qui a été endommagé par l'incendie ?
phrases.pronunciation: kess kee ah ay-TAY ahn-doh-mah-ZHAY par lahn-SAHN-dee
phrases.cultural_note: The 2019 fire destroyed the spire and most of the roof. The rose windows and main structure survived. The restoration was a remarkable feat of craftsmanship.

phrases.text_local: À quelle heure sont les messes ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR sohn lay MESS
phrases.cultural_note: Notre-Dame is a working cathedral. Mass services are open to all. Respectful silence and appropriate dress are expected inside.
